symbols: flooded barren trees — desolation and the aftermath of destruction
standing water amid dead vegetation — a landscape overwhelmed by forces beyond control
description: A dense, tangled landscape of bare trees and shrubs rising from waterlogged, flooded ground. The trees are leafless with intricate branching patterns filling the entire composition. Dark water pools reflect the gray sky between the trunks and undergrowth. The palette is almost entirely monochrome—grays, browns, and blacks—creating a bleak, desolate atmosphere. The scene is highly detailed with an almost photographic precision in rendering the tangled branches.
